name: Sweetwater Regional
description_short: ERROR: This is not a financial services company. Sweetwater Summit Regional Park is a San Diego County public park offering camping, day-use facilities, trails, and recreational activities—not consumer finance services.
description_long: CRITICAL MISCATEGORIZATION DETECTED: Sweetwater Regional (Sweetwater Summit Regional Park) is a 3,218 Summit Meadow Road public recreation facility operated by San Diego County Parks and Recreation, not a payday-alternative lender or any financial services company. The website content provided shows exclusively park amenities including camping reservations, day-use hours, parking information, hiking trails, and recreational activities. There is no evidence of lending, credit products, loan services, or financial assistance offerings on this domain. The URL https://www.sdparks.org/content/sdparks/en/park-pages/SweetwaterSummit.html confirms this is an official San Diego Parks Department property page. This entry appears to have been created in error, possibly due to a data import mistake, name confusion, or deliberate mistagging. No legitimate financial services profile can be built from park recreation content. The company does not offer payday loans, alternative credit products, or any consumer finance services whatsoever. CreditDoc should remove this entry entirely or recategorize it as non-financial.
